# SteelBench requirements
# Pinned to versions verified working as of 2026-05-03.
# Generated by scanning imports across annotation_tool/, eval_runners/,
# scripts/, src/, and top-level modules.

# --- Core: video processing and detection ---
# numpy left unpinned: opencv 4.13+ requires numpy>=2; venv is isolated from
# the global Python's numpy<2 constraint (which other tools like pandas need).
ultralytics>=8.4,<9
opencv-contrib-python-headless>=4.10
numpy
Pillow>=10.4
scipy>=1.13

# --- Configuration ---
pyyaml==6.0.2
python-dotenv==1.0.0

# --- VLM APIs (eval_inference.py runs against all of these) ---
openai>=2.30,<3
anthropic>=0.40
google-genai
boto3>=1.34

# --- Annotation UI and dashboards ---
streamlit==1.56.0

# --- Anonymization (Task B). 0.10.14 retains the legacy
#     mp.solutions.face_detection API used by scripts/anonymize_frames.py.
#     0.10.35 removes mp.solutions and would require rewriting the script. ---
mediapipe==0.10.14

# --- Utilities ---
tqdm==4.67.1

# --- Local VLM inference (optional, for annotation_tool/vlm_annotator.py
#     call_vlm_local path; remote API calls don't need these) ---
torch==2.7.1
transformers>=4.45
